name: patterns
description: Workflow pattern manager for Claude Code

metadata.description: Lists, instantiates, and patches workflow patterns. Ships with a /patterns command that auto-detects project context, fills kickoff prompts, and creates command/agent files from templates. Includes the agent-monitoring pattern for runtime agent behavior auditing.

plugins.name: patterns
plugins.description: 1 command (/patterns) + 1 pattern template (agent-monitoring). Supports list / instantiate / --patch modes. Auto-fills kickoff prompts from CLAUDE.md or shell probes. Generated files include generated-from traceability field.
